narrative_beat: Wide contre-jour do profeta João em Patmos ao pôr-do-sol

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a wide contre-jour of a rocky Aegean seaside cliff at sunset with the silhouette of an elderly bearded prophet in a crimson-ochre robe standing and holding a rolled parchment
subject.focal_point: the prophet silhouette against the setting sun
subject.secondary: The sun blazes intense gold on the horizon behind him; the sea churns in desaturated black-and-white; distant gulls glide.

environment.location: a rocky cliff on the Greek island of Patmos

composition.foreground: prophet silhouette rim-lit in crimson and gold
composition.midground: rocky cliff edge with scattered stones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white churning Aegean sea with distant gulls

lighting.key_light: intense golden sun from horizon behind prophet

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
